import { FastifyInstance } from 'fastify';
import { requireAdmin } from '../middleware/auth';
import { mangaDexScraper } from '../services/mangaDexScraper';
import { consumetScraper } from '../services/consumetScraper';

export async function scrapeApiRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance) {

  // --- MANGADEX (Manga) ---

  // POST /api/scrape/mangadex/search — Search & import manga
  fastify.post('/api/scrape/mangadex/search', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { query, limit } = request.body as { query: string; limit?: number };
    if (!query) return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Query wajib diisi' });

    const result = await mangaDexScraper.searchAndImport(query, limit || 10);
    return { success: true, data: result, message: `Imported ${result.created} baru, ${result.updated} diperbarui` };
  });

  // POST /api/scrape/mangadex/trending — Import trending manga
  fastify.post('/api/scrape/mangadex/trending', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { limit } = request.body as { limit?: number };
    const result = await mangaDexScraper.importTrending(limit || 20);
    return { success: true, data: result, message: `Trending: ${result.created} baru, ${result.updated} diperbarui` };
  });

  // POST /api/scrape/mangadex/chapters — Import chapters for a manga
  fastify.post('/api/scrape/mangadex/chapters', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { slug, mangadexId, limit } = request.body as { slug: string; mangadexId: string; limit?: number };
    if (!slug || !mangadexId) return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'slug dan mangadexId wajib' });

    const imported = await mangaDexScraper.importChapters(slug, mangadexId, limit || 20);
    return { success: true, data: { imported }, message: `${imported} chapter berhasil diimport` };
  });

  // --- CONSUMET (Anime/Donghua) ---

  // POST /api/scrape/consumet/search — Search & import anime
  fastify.post('/api/scrape/consumet/search', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { query, limit } = request.body as { query: string; limit?: number };
    if (!query) return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Query wajib diisi' });

    const result = await consumetScraper.searchAndImport(query, limit || 10);
    return { success: true, data: result, message: `Imported ${result.created} baru, ${result.updated} diperbarui` };
  });

  // POST /api/scrape/consumet/trending — Import trending anime
  fastify.post('/api/scrape/consumet/trending', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const result = await consumetScraper.importTrending();
    return { success: true, data: result, message: `Trending: ${result.created} baru, ${result.updated} diperbarui` };
  });

  // POST /api/scrape/consumet/episodes — Import episodes for an anime
  fastify.post('/api/scrape/consumet/episodes', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { slug, gogoanimeId } = request.body as { slug: string; gogoanimeId: string };
    if (!slug || !gogoanimeId) return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'slug dan gogoanimeId wajib' });

    const imported = await consumetScraper.importEpisodes(slug, gogoanimeId);
    return { success: true, data: { imported }, message: `${imported} episode berhasil diimport` };
  });

  // --- COMBINED: Quick Import ---

  // POST /api/scrape/quick — Quick import trending from both sources
  fastify.post('/api/scrape/quick', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    console.log('[Scrape] Starting quick import...');
    
    const [mangaResult, animeResult] = await Promise.all([
      mangaDexScraper.importTrending(15),
      consumetScraper.importTrending(),
    ]);

    return { 
      success: true, 
      data: {
        manga: mangaResult,
        anime: animeResult,
        total: {
          created: mangaResult.created + animeResult.created,
          updated: mangaResult.updated + animeResult.updated,
        }
      },
      message: `Quick import selesai: ${mangaResult.created + animeResult.created} konten baru`
    };
  });
}

import { FastifyInstance } from 'fastify';
import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
import { requireAdmin } from '../middleware/auth';
import { emitNotification } from '../services/socketManager';

const prisma = new PrismaClient();

export async function contentRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance) {

  // GET /api/content/:id
  fastify.get('/api/content/:id', async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const content = await prisma.content.findUnique({
      where: { id },
      include: { genres: true, tags: true, episodes: { orderBy: { number: 'desc' } } }
    });
    if (!content) return reply.status(404).send({ success: false, message: 'Konten tidak ditemukan' });
    return { success: true, data: content };
  });

  // POST /api/content (Admin)
  fastify.post('/api/content', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { title, description, imageUrl, type, status, rating, author, artist, studio, releasedAt, genreIds, tagIds } = request.body as any;

    if (!title || !type) {
      return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Title dan type wajib diisi' });
    }

    const slug = title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '');

    // Check slug uniqueness
    const existing = await prisma.content.findUnique({ where: { slug } });
    if (existing) {
      return reply.status(409).send({ success: false, message: 'Konten dengan judul serupa sudah ada' });
    }

    const content = await prisma.content.create({
      data: {
        title,
        slug,
        description: description || '',
        imageUrl: imageUrl || '',
        type,
        status: status || 'ONGOING',
        rating: rating ? parseFloat(rating) : 0,
        author: author || null,
        artist: artist || null,
        studio: studio || null,
        releasedAt: releasedAt || null,
        ...(genreIds?.length && { genres: { connect: genreIds.map((id: string) => ({ id })) } }),
        ...(tagIds?.length && { tags: { connect: tagIds.map((id: string) => ({ id })) } }),
      },
      include: { genres: true, tags: true }
    });

    return { success: true, data: content };
  });

  // PUT /api/content/:id (Admin)
  fastify.put('/api/content/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { title, description, imageUrl, type, status, rating, author, artist, studio, releasedAt, genreIds, tagIds } = request.body as any;

    const existing = await prisma.content.findUnique({ where: { id } });
    if (!existing) return reply.status(404).send({ success: false, message: 'Konten tidak ditemukan' });

    const content = await prisma.content.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        ...(title && { title }),
        ...(title && { slug: title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '') }),
        ...(description !== undefined && { description }),
        ...(imageUrl !== undefined && { imageUrl }),
        ...(type && { type }),
        ...(status && { status }),
        ...(rating !== undefined && { rating: parseFloat(rating) }),
        ...(author !== undefined && { author }),
        ...(artist !== undefined && { artist }),
        ...(studio !== undefined && { studio }),
        ...(releasedAt !== undefined && { releasedAt }),
        ...(genreIds && { genres: { set: genreIds.map((gid: string) => ({ id: gid })) } }),
        ...(tagIds && { tags: { set: tagIds.map((tid: string) => ({ id: tid })) } }),
      },
      include: { genres: true, tags: true }
    });

    return { success: true, data: content };
  });

  // DELETE /api/content/:id (Admin)
  fastify.delete('/api/content/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const existing = await prisma.content.findUnique({ where: { id } });
    if (!existing) return reply.status(404).send({ success: false, message: 'Konten tidak ditemukan' });

    await prisma.content.delete({ where: { id } });
    return { success: true, message: 'Konten berhasil dihapus' };
  });

  // --- EPISODES ---

  // GET /api/content/:id/episodes
  fastify.get('/api/content/:id/episodes', async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const episodes = await prisma.episode.findMany({
      where: { contentId: id },
      orderBy: { number: 'desc' }
    });
    return { success: true, data: episodes };
  });

  // GET /api/episodes (all episodes with content info)
  fastify.get('/api/episodes', async (request, reply) => {
    const { contentId, type, limit } = request.query as any;
    const episodes = await prisma.episode.findMany({
      where: {
        ...(contentId && { contentId }),
        ...(type && { type }),
      },
      include: { content: { select: { title: true, type: true, slug: true } } },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      take: limit ? parseInt(limit) : 50
    });
    return { success: true, data: episodes };
  });

  // POST /api/episodes (Admin)
  fastify.post('/api/episodes', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { title, number, contentId, videoUrl, images, type } = request.body as any;

    if (!title || !contentId || number === undefined) {
      return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Title, contentId, dan number wajib diisi' });
    }

    const slug = `${title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '')}-${number}`;

    const episode = await prisma.episode.create({
      data: {
        title,
        slug,
        number: parseFloat(number),
        contentId,
        videoUrl: videoUrl || null,
        images: images || [],
        type: type || 'FREE',
      }
    });

    // Emit real-time notification
    emitNotification('notification:new', {
      type: 'episode',
      title: 'Episode baru tersedia!',
      desc: `${episode.title} telah ditambahkan`,
      time: new Date().toISOString(),
    });

    return { success: true, data: episode };
  });

  // PUT /api/episodes/:id (Admin)
  fastify.put('/api/episodes/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { title, number, videoUrl, images, type } = request.body as any;

    const episode = await prisma.episode.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        ...(title && { title }),
        ...(number !== undefined && { number: parseFloat(number) }),
        ...(videoUrl !== undefined && { videoUrl }),
        ...(images && { images }),
        ...(type && { type }),
      }
    });

    return { success: true, data: episode };
  });

  // DELETE /api/episodes/:id (Admin)
  fastify.delete('/api/episodes/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    await prisma.episode.delete({ where: { id } });
    return { success: true, message: 'Episode berhasil dihapus' };
  });

  // POST /api/episodes/batch (Admin - Batch Upload)
  fastify.post('/api/episodes/batch', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { episodes } = request.body as { episodes: any[] };

    if (!episodes?.length) {
      return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Data episodes kosong' });
    }

    const created = await prisma.episode.createMany({
      data: episodes.map((ep: any) => ({
        title: ep.title,
        slug: `${ep.title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '')}-${ep.number}`,
        number: parseFloat(ep.number),
        contentId: ep.contentId,
        videoUrl: ep.videoUrl || null,
        images: ep.images || [],
        type: ep.type || 'FREE',
      }))
    });

    return { success: true, data: { count: created.count } };
  });

  // PUT /api/episodes/reorder (Admin - Reorder episodes)
  fastify.put('/api/episodes/reorder', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { episodes } = request.body as { episodes: { id: string; number: number }[] };

    if (!episodes?.length) {
      return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Data kosong' });
    }

    for (const ep of episodes) {
      await prisma.episode.update({
        where: { id: ep.id },
        data: { number: ep.number }
      });
    }

    return { success: true, message: 'Urutan berhasil diperbarui' };
  });
}

</content>

- If you are certain a command will complete quickly despite triggering a warning, you can use ignoreWarning: true to bypass the check.

toolSpecification.name: file_search

toolSpecification.description:
Fast text-based regex search that finds exact pattern matches within files or directories using ripgrep.
Search results include line numbers, file paths, and 2 lines of context around each match.

Parameters:
- query (required): The regex pattern to search for. Use Rust regex syntax.
- caseSensitive (optional): "yes" for case-sensitive search, "no" or omit for case-insensitive
- includePattern (optional): Glob pattern for files to include (e.g. '**/*.ts', 'src/**/*.js'). Use ** for recursive search. If omitted, searches all files in workspace
- excludePattern (optional): Glob pattern for files to exclude (e.g. '*.log', 'node_modules/**')
- explanation (optional): Brief description of why this search is being performed

Search Behavior:
- Use includePattern or excludePattern to filter the search scope by file type or specific paths. If no includePattern is specified, the tool will search all files.
- The results are capped at 100 matches and long lines are truncated with "[truncated: line too long]" indicator.
- If total output is too large, truncates with "[truncated: too many matches]" message.

Examples of VALID patterns to use as "query":
- Basic text search: "function", "error", "TODO"
- Word boundaries: "\bword\b" (matches 'word' but not 'password')
- Multiple words: "auth.*failed"
- File content with spaces: "not found"
- Line starts with: "^import"
- Line ends with: "};$"
- Numbers: "\d+\.\d+" (finds decimal numbers like 3.14)
- Word followed by another: "function\s+\w+" (finds function declarations)

Rules:
1. Keep regex patterns simple. Complex patterns may fail.
2. Use includePattern to narrow search scope for better performance
3. Glob patterns: use standard glob syntax (* for wildcards, ** for recursive). Always use ** for recursive search (e.g. "**/*.py" not "*.py")
4. Prefer this tool over bash grep, as it is optimized for your machine and provides structured results.
5. Always escape special regex characters: ( ) [ ] { } + * ? ^ $ | . \
6. You MUST use \\ to escape any of special regex characters when they appear in your search string.

userInputMessage.content:
# Efficient Context Gathering Agent

You are a context gathering specialist that identifies and retrieves the minimal, sufficient information needed to address user queries.

## Your Mission

Intelligently gather ONLY essential code sections using the cheapest effective approach. Maximize parallel operations and batch file reads.

## Available Context

You have been provided with the following context to help you understand the codebase structure:

### File Tree
#[[fileTree]]

### Currently Open Files
#[[currentlyOpenFiles:all]]

## Step 1: Analyze Available Context (BEFORE any tool calls)

Check what's already provided above:
- **File tree** - Already provided, use it to identify relevant directories and files
- **Open files** - Shows what the user is currently working on
- **Documentation** - Check README, docs folders for high-level understanding
- **Package files** - package.json, tsconfig.json for project structure

## Step 2: Choose Strategy Based on Query

**Clear file names + descriptive query:**
→ Direct batch read (1 tool call)
Example: "Fix login validation" + auth/login_validator.ts
Tools: readMultipleFiles([file1, file2, ...])

**Specific symbols mentioned:**
→ Targeted search then batch read (2 tool calls)
Example: "Where is UserService.authenticate?"
Tools: grepSearch → readMultipleFiles

**Documentation available:**
→ Check docs first (1-2 tool calls)
Example: "How does rate limiting work?" + README.md present
Tools: readFile(README.md) or grepSearch → readMultipleFiles if needed

**Vague query + unclear structure:**
→ Explore structure then targeted reads (2-3 tool calls)
Tools: listDirectory → fileSearch/grepSearch → readMultipleFiles

## Tool Usage Guidelines

**ALWAYS BATCH - Never sequential reads:**
✅ readMultipleFiles([file1, file2, file3]) - 1 call
❌ readFile(file1) → readFile(file2) → readFile(file3) - 3 calls

**ALWAYS PARALLEL - Make independent calls together:**
✅ Call grepSearch + readFile(README) in same turn if independent
❌ Wait for grep results before reading README if unrelated

**Tool Cost Hierarchy (cheap to expensive):**
1. **CHEAP**: fileSearch, grepSearch, executeBash (quick shell commands)
2. **MODERATE**: readFile, readMultipleFiles (prefer batched)
3. **EXPENSIVE**: readCode (AST-based, use when symbol relationships needed)

**When to use each tool:**
- readMultipleFiles: Primary tool - batch read 2-5 pre-identified files
- readFile: Only for single file (prefer batching)
- fileSearch/grepSearch: Locate specific symbols/patterns before reading
- executeBash: Quick checks (file existence, line counts, git log)
- readCode: Only when need AST-based symbol analysis
- getDiagnostics: Check for errors in specific files

## Tool Call Budget

**Target: 1-2 calls** (most queries with clear signals)
**Acceptable: 3 calls** (complex queries, cheap operations)
**Maximum: 4 calls** (only if truly necessary)

## Decision Framework

1. Are file names descriptive for this query?
   → YES: Batch read obvious candidates (1 call)
   → NO: Continue to step 2

2. Does query mention specific symbols/functions?
   → YES: Search then batch read (2 calls)
   → NO: Continue to step 3

3. Are there README/docs files?
   → YES: Read/grep docs first (1-2 calls)
   → NO: Continue to step 4

4. Can you identify 2-4 likely files from structure?
   → YES: Batch read them (1 call)
   → NO: Use search tools to narrow down (2-3 calls)

## Critical Rules

1. **Batch all file reads** - Use readMultipleFiles whenever reading 2+ files
2. **Parallel independent operations** - Make unrelated tool calls together
3. **Cheap before expensive** - Try search/docs before expensive operations
4. **Extract minimal content** - Only sections directly related to query
5. **Maximum 2-5 files** - Be highly selective
6. **Provide actionable context** - Focus on what's needed to solve the problem

## Output Format

You MUST call the subagentResponse tool as your final action.

For each relevant file, specify the file path and the precise line ranges that contain relevant code.
Use the files parameter with path, startLine, and endLine for each section.

**IMPORTANT:**
- Include ONLY the relevant parts of files - not entire files
- The same file can be referenced multiple times with different startLine/endLine combinations
- Use precise line ranges to include only the code sections that matter

Example subagentResponse call:
{
  "response": "Found authentication implementation and validation logic",
  "files": [
    { "path": "src/auth/login.ts", "startLine": 10, "endLine": 45 },
    { "path": "src/auth/login.ts", "startLine": 80, "endLine": 120 },
    { "path": "src/auth/validator.ts", "startLine": 5, "endLine": 35 }
  ]
}

**Goal: Minimum tool calls, maximum information gain, intelligent cost management.**
<progress_reporting>
- You MUST use the reportProgress tool every 4-5 turns to update on your current status
- Keep progress messages concise (1-2 sentences)
- Focus on what you're currently working on and any significant findings
- Examples:
  - "Reviewed authentication module, identified 2 security concerns"
  - "Completed file analysis, now generating test cases"
  - "Refactored 5 components, running tests to verify changes"
- This helps track long-running tasks and provides visibility to the parent agent
</progress_reporting>

<response_requirement>
- You MUST use the subagentResponse tool to communicate your final result back to the parent agent
- This is REQUIRED - do not end your execution without calling subagentResponse
- Include a clear, concise summary of what you accomplished in the response parameter
- If you found relevant files that the parent agent should see, include them in the files parameter
- The parent agent cannot see your work unless you call subagentResponse
</response_requirement>

<content>
import { FastifyInstance } from 'fastify';
import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
import { requireAdmin, requireSuperAdmin } from '../middleware/auth';

const prisma = new PrismaClient();

export async function adminRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance) {

  // --- NEWS CRUD ---

  // PUT /api/news/:id
  fastify.put('/api/news/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { title, content, imageUrl, category, isFeatured } = request.body as any;

    const news = await prisma.news.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        ...(title && { title, slug: title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '') }),
        ...(content !== undefined && { content }),
        ...(imageUrl !== undefined && { imageUrl }),
        ...(category && { category }),
        ...(isFeatured !== undefined && { isFeatured }),
      }
    });
    return { success: true, data: news };
  });

  // DELETE /api/news/:id
  fastify.delete('/api/news/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    await prisma.news.delete({ where: { id } });
    return { success: true, message: 'Berita berhasil dihapus' };
  });

  // --- BANNERS CRUD ---

  // POST /api/banners
  fastify.post('/api/banners', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { title, subtitle, description, imageUrl, link, order, isActive } = request.body as any;
    if (!title || !imageUrl) return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Title dan imageUrl wajib' });

    const banner = await prisma.banner.create({
      data: { title, subtitle, description, imageUrl, link, order: order || 0, isActive: isActive !== false }
    });
    return { success: true, data: banner };
  });

  // PUT /api/banners/:id
  fastify.put('/api/banners/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { title, subtitle, description, imageUrl, link, order, isActive } = request.body as any;

    const banner = await prisma.banner.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        ...(title && { title }),
        ...(subtitle !== undefined && { subtitle }),
        ...(description !== undefined && { description }),
        ...(imageUrl && { imageUrl }),
        ...(link !== undefined && { link }),
        ...(order !== undefined && { order }),
        ...(isActive !== undefined && { isActive }),
      }
    });
    return { success: true, data: banner };
  });

  // DELETE /api/banners/:id
  fastify.delete('/api/banners/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    await prisma.banner.delete({ where: { id } });
    return { success: true, message: 'Banner berhasil dihapus' };
  });

  // GET /api/banners/all (admin - include inactive)
  fastify.get('/api/banners/all', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const banners = await prisma.banner.findMany({ orderBy: { order: 'asc' } });
    return { success: true, data: banners };
  });

  // --- COMMENTS MODERATION ---

  // GET /api/comments (Admin or filtered by contentId for public)
  fastify.get('/api/comments', async (request, reply) => {
    const { status, limit, contentId } = request.query as any;
    const comments = await prisma.comment.findMany({
      where: { 
        ...(status && { status }),
        ...(contentId && { contentId }),
      },
      include: {
        user: { select: { username: true, avatar: true } },
        content: { select: { title: true, type: true } }
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      take: limit ? parseInt(limit) : 50
    });
    return { success: true, data: comments };
  });

  // POST /api/comments (authenticated user)
  fastify.post('/api/comments', async (request, reply) => {
    try {
      await request.jwtVerify();
      const { id: userId } = request.user as { id: string };
      const { text, contentId } = request.body as any;

      if (!text || !contentId) {
        return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Text dan contentId wajib' });
      }

      const comment = await prisma.comment.create({
        data: { text, contentId, userId, status: 'PENDING' },
        include: { user: { select: { username: true, avatar: true } } }
      });
      return { success: true, data: comment };
    } catch {
      return reply.status(401).send({ success: false, message: 'Login diperlukan' });
    }
  });

  // PUT /api/comments/:id (approve/reject)
  fastify.put('/api/comments/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { status } = request.body as { status: string };

    const comment = await prisma.comment.update({
      where: { id },
      data: { status }
    });
    return { success: true, data: comment };
  });

  // DELETE /api/comments/:id
  fastify.delete('/api/comments/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    await prisma.comment.delete({ where: { id } });
    return { success: true, message: 'Komentar berhasil dihapus' };
  });

  // --- PAGES CRUD ---

  // GET /api/pages
  fastify.get('/api/pages', async (request, reply) => {
    const pages = await prisma.page.findMany({ orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' } });
    return { success: true, data: pages };
  });

  // POST /api/pages
  fastify.post('/api/pages', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { title, content } = request.body as any;
    if (!title || !content) return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Title dan content wajib' });

    const slug = title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '');
    const page = await prisma.page.create({ data: { title, slug, content } });
    return { success: true, data: page };
  });

  // PUT /api/pages/:id
  fastify.put('/api/pages/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { title, content } = request.body as any;

    const page = await prisma.page.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        ...(title && { title, slug: title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '') }),
        ...(content && { content }),
      }
    });
    return { success: true, data: page };
  });

  // DELETE /api/pages/:id
  fastify.delete('/api/pages/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    await prisma.page.delete({ where: { id } });
    return { success: true, message: 'Halaman berhasil dihapus' };
  });

  // --- ADS CRUD ---

  // GET /api/ads
  fastify.get('/api/ads', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const ads = await prisma.ad.findMany({ orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' } });
    return { success: true, data: ads };
  });

  // POST /api/ads
  fastify.post('/api/ads', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { title, position, type, imageUrl, linkUrl, status, startDate, endDate } = request.body as any;
    if (!title || !position) return reply.status(400).send({ success: false, message: 'Title dan position wajib' });

    const ad = await prisma.ad.create({
      data: {
        title, position, type: type || 'IMAGE',
        imageUrl, linkUrl, status: status || 'ACTIVE',
        startDate: startDate ? new Date(startDate) : null,
        endDate: endDate ? new Date(endDate) : null,
      }
    });
    return { success: true, data: ad };
  });

  // PUT /api/ads/:id
  fastify.put('/api/ads/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { title, position, type, imageUrl, linkUrl, status, startDate, endDate } = request.body as any;

    const ad = await prisma.ad.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        ...(title && { title }),
        ...(position && { position }),
        ...(type && { type }),
        ...(imageUrl !== undefined && { imageUrl }),
        ...(linkUrl !== undefined && { linkUrl }),
        ...(status && { status }),
        ...(startDate !== undefined && { startDate: startDate ? new Date(startDate) : null }),
        ...(endDate !== undefined && { endDate: endDate ? new Date(endDate) : null }),
      }
    });
    return { success: true, data: ad };
  });

  // DELETE /api/ads/:id
  fastify.delete('/api/ads/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    await prisma.ad.delete({ where: { id } });
    return { success: true, message: 'Iklan berhasil dihapus' };
  });

  // --- SETTINGS ---

  // GET /api/settings
  fastify.get('/api/settings', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const settings = await prisma.setting.findMany();
    const obj: Record<string, string> = {};
    settings.forEach((s: any) => { obj[s.key] = s.value; });
    return { success: true, data: obj };
  });

  // PUT /api/settings
  fastify.put('/api/settings', { preHandler: [requireSuperAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const data = request.body as Record<string, string>;

    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(data)) {
      await prisma.setting.upsert({
        where: { key },
        update: { value },
        create: { key, value }
      });
    }
    return { success: true, message: 'Settings berhasil disimpan' };
  });

  // --- SEO ---

  // GET /api/seo
  fastify.get('/api/seo', async (request, reply) => {
    const seo = await prisma.seoConfig.findFirst();
    return { success: true, data: seo };
  });

  // PUT /api/seo
  fastify.put('/api/seo', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { title, description, keywords, ogTitle, ogDescription, ogImage, robotsMeta } = request.body as any;

    const existing = await prisma.seoConfig.findFirst();
    let seo;

    if (existing) {
      seo = await prisma.seoConfig.update({
        where: { id: existing.id },
        data: { title, description, keywords, ogTitle, ogDescription, ogImage, robotsMeta }
      });
    } else {
      seo = await prisma.seoConfig.create({
        data: { title, description, keywords, ogTitle, ogDescription, ogImage, robotsMeta }
      });
    }
    return { success: true, data: seo };
  });

  // --- ACTIVITY LOGS ---

  // GET /api/activity-logs
  fastify.get('/api/activity-logs', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { userId, module, limit } = request.query as any;
    const logs = await prisma.activityLog.findMany({
      where: {
        ...(userId && { userId }),
        ...(module && { module }),
      },
      include: { user: { select: { username: true, avatar: true } } },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      take: limit ? parseInt(limit) : 50
    });
    return { success: true, data: logs };
  });

  // --- DASHBOARD STATS ---

  // GET /api/dashboard/stats
  fastify.get('/api/dashboard/stats', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const [
      totalUsers, totalContent, totalEpisodes, totalComments,
      totalViews, totalNews, totalBanners
    ] = await Promise.all([
      prisma.user.count(),
      prisma.content.count(),
      prisma.episode.count(),
      prisma.comment.count(),
      prisma.episode.aggregate({ _sum: { views: true } }),
      prisma.news.count(),
      prisma.banner.count(),
    ]);

    // Recent content
    const recentContent = await prisma.content.findMany({
      take: 5,
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      include: { genres: true }
    });

    // Popular content (by rating)
    const popularContent = await prisma.content.findMany({
      take: 5,
      orderBy: { rating: 'desc' },
      select: { id: true, title: true, type: true, rating: true, imageUrl: true }
    });

    // Recent activity
    const recentActivity = await prisma.activityLog.findMany({
      take: 10,
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      include: { user: { select: { username: true } } }
    });

    return {
      success: true,
      data: {
        stats: {
          totalUsers,
          totalContent,
          totalEpisodes,
          totalComments,
          totalViews: totalViews._sum.views || 0,
          totalNews,
          totalBanners,
        },
        recentContent,
        popularContent,
        recentActivity,
      }
    };
  });
}

import { FastifyInstance } from 'fastify';
import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
import { requireAdmin, requireSuperAdmin } from '../middleware/auth';
import * as bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';

const prisma = new PrismaClient();

export async function userRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance) {

  // GET /api/users (Admin)
  fastify.get('/api/users', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { role, status, q, limit } = request.query as any;
    const users = await prisma.user.findMany({
      where: {
        ...(role && { role }),
        ...(status && { status }),
        ...(q && {
          OR: [
            { username: { contains: q, mode: 'insensitive' } },
            { email: { contains: q, mode: 'insensitive' } },
            { name: { contains: q, mode: 'insensitive' } },
          ]
        }),
      },
      select: {
        id: true,
        username: true,
        email: true,
        name: true,
        avatar: true,
        role: true,
        status: true,
        lastLogin: true,
        createdAt: true,
        _count: { select: { comments: true, activityLogs: true } }
      },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      take: limit ? parseInt(limit) : 50
    });
    return { success: true, data: users };
  });

  // GET /api/users/:id (Admin)
  fastify.get('/api/users/:id', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { id },
      select: {
        id: true, username: true, email: true, name: true,
        avatar: true, role: true, status: true, lastLogin: true, createdAt: true,
        comments: { take: 10, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' } },
        activityLogs: { take: 10, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' } },
      }
    });
    if (!user) return reply.status(404).send({ success: false, message: 'User tidak ditemukan' });
    return { success: true, data: user };
  });

  // PUT /api/users/:id (Admin - update role/status)
  fastify.put('/api/users/:id', { preHandler: [requireSuperAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    const { role, status, name, password } = request.body as any;

    const updateData: any = {};
    if (role) updateData.role = role;
    if (status) updateData.status = status;
    if (name) updateData.name = name;
    if (password) updateData.password = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10);

    const user = await prisma.user.update({
      where: { id },
      data: updateData,
      select: { id: true, username: true, email: true, name: true, role: true, status: true }
    });

    return { success: true, data: user };
  });

  // DELETE /api/users/:id (Super Admin)
  fastify.delete('/api/users/:id', { preHandler: [requireSuperAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const { id } = request.params as { id: string };
    await prisma.user.delete({ where: { id } });
    return { success: true, message: 'User berhasil dihapus' };
  });

  // GET /api/users/stats (Admin)
  fastify.get('/api/users/stats', { preHandler: [requireAdmin] }, async (request, reply) => {
    const [total, aktif, nonAktif, diblokir] = await Promise.all([
      prisma.user.count(),
      prisma.user.count({ where: { status: 'AKTIF' } }),
      prisma.user.count({ where: { status: 'NON_AKTIF' } }),
      prisma.user.count({ where: { status: 'DIBLOKIR' } }),
    ]);
    return { success: true, data: { total, aktif, nonAktif, diblokir } };
  });
}

import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
import * as bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';

const prisma = new PrismaClient();

const SALT_ROUNDS = 10;

export class AuthService {
  /**
   * Register a new user
   */
  async register(data: { username: string; email: string; password: string }) {
    // Check if email already exists
    const existingEmail = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email: data.email } });
    if (existingEmail) {
      throw { statusCode: 409, message: 'Email sudah terdaftar' };
    }

    // Check if username already exists
    const existingUsername = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { username: data.username } });
    if (existingUsername) {
      throw { statusCode: 409, message: 'Username sudah digunakan' };
    }

    // Hash password
    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(data.password, SALT_ROUNDS);

    // Create user
    const user = await prisma.user.create({
      data: {
        username: data.username,
        email: data.email,
        password: hashedPassword,
        role: 'USER',
        status: 'AKTIF',
      },
      select: {
        id: true,
        username: true,
        email: true,
        name: true,
        avatar: true,
        role: true,
        status: true,
        createdAt: true,
      }
    });

    return user;
  }

  /**
   * Login with email + password, returns user data (token generated in route)
   */
  async login(email: string, password: string) {
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email } });

    if (!user) {
      throw { statusCode: 401, message: 'Email atau password salah' };
    }

    if (user.status === 'DIBLOKIR') {
      throw { statusCode: 403, message: 'Akun Anda telah diblokir' };
    }

    const isValid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
    if (!isValid) {
      throw { statusCode: 401, message: 'Email atau password salah' };
    }

    // Update last login
    await prisma.user.update({
      where: { id: user.id },
      data: { lastLogin: new Date() }
    });

    return {
      id: user.id,
      username: user.username,
      email: user.email,
      name: user.name,
      avatar: user.avatar,
      role: user.role,
      status: user.status,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Get user profile by ID
   */
  async getProfile(userId: string) {
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { id: userId },
      select: {
        id: true,
        username: true,
        email: true,
        name: true,
        avatar: true,
        role: true,
        status: true,
        lastLogin: true,
        createdAt: true,
      }
    });

    if (!user) {
      throw { statusCode: 404, message: 'User tidak ditemukan' };
    }

    return user;
  }

  /**
   * Hash a plain password (utility for seeding)
   */
  async hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {
    return bcrypt.hash(password, SALT_ROUNDS);
  }
}

export const authService = new AuthService();
